mapper.select: SELECT id, building_id, room_no, floor_no, bed_count, room_status, created_at, updated_at FROM dorm_rooms WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} ORDER BY floor_no ASC, room_no ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, building_id, room_no, floor_no, bed_count, room_status, created_at, updated_at FROM dorm_rooms WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND UPPER(COALESCE(room_status, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY floor_no ASC, room_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, building_id, room_no, floor_no, bed_count, room_status, created_at, updated_at FROM dorm_rooms WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, building_id, room_no, floor_no, bed_count, room_status, created_at, updated_at FROM dorm_rooms WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND room_no = #{roomNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dorm_rooms ( building_id, room_no, floor_no, bed_count, room_status, building_no, campus_name ) VALUES ( #{buildingId}, #{roomNo}, #{floorNo}, #{bedCount}, #{roomStatus}, (SELECT building_no FROM dorm_buildings WHERE id = #{buildingId}), (SELECT campus_name FROM dorm_buildings WHERE id = #{buildingId}) )
mapper.update: UPDATE dorm_rooms SET building_id = #{buildingId}, room_no = #{roomNo}, floor_no = #{floorNo}, bed_count = #{bedCount}, room_status = #{roomStatus}, building_no = (SELECT building_no FROM dorm_buildings WHERE id = #{buildingId}), campus_name = (SELECT campus_name FROM dorm_buildings WHERE id = #{buildingId}) WHERE id = #{id}
